ciSkippedSites.reason: Real PDF fixtures exercise Tika/PDFBox cold-start behavior that has exceeded hosted Windows unit-test budgets.

ciSkippedSites.cadence: local before changing PDF extraction, VDU eligibility, or fixture resources

ciSkippedSites.cadence: local before changing structured extraction, PDF handling, or parser fixture resources

declaredTags.reason: AI/model-dependent tests are excluded unless opt-in flags are set.
declaredTags.cadence: manual or targeted before changing AI/model-dependent behavior

declaredTags.reason: System tests exercise multi-process behavior and are not part of default hosted unit-test evidence.

declaredTags.reason: Evidence-tagged tests preserve specific measurements or proof cases outside ordinary unit semantics.
